case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. JASON H WINSTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $955.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WINSTON, JASON H ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
